description: Call-to-action section patterns for business websites. Each pattern defines layout, elements, and conversion-optimized structure.

patterns.name: Single Button Centered
patterns.description: Clean centered CTA with headline, supporting text, and a single prominent button. The simplest and most versatile CTA.
patterns.conversion_tip: Use action verbs: 'Get Your Free Quote', 'Book Now', 'Start Today'.

patterns.name: Two Buttons
patterns.description: Primary and secondary action buttons side by side. Lets users choose between direct action and learning more.

structure.buttons: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4

patterns.conversion_tip: Primary: direct action ('Book Appointment'). Secondary: lower commitment ('See Our Work').

patterns.name: CTA with Phone Number
patterns.description: Prominent phone number alongside a button. Essential for service businesses where calls drive revenue.

structure.actions: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4

patterns.conversion_tip: Make the phone number tappable (tel: link). Show hours next to it if applicable.

patterns.name: CTA with Form
patterns.description: Inline form embedded in the CTA section. Captures leads directly without page navigation.

structure.content: max-w-4xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 items-center

patterns.conversion_tip: Keep form fields to 3-4 max. Add privacy note below submit button.

patterns.name: CTA with Testimonial
patterns.description: CTA paired with a customer testimonial for social proof reinforcement at the conversion point.

structure.content: max-w-4xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center

patterns.conversion_tip: Use the most specific, results-oriented testimonial. Include the reviewer's name and photo.

patterns.name: Sticky Bottom Bar
patterns.description: Fixed bar at the bottom of the viewport with business name, phone, and CTA button. Always visible on scroll.

structure.container: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-background border-t shadow-lg
structure.content: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between

patterns.conversion_tip: Show only on mobile. Hide after user has scrolled past the main CTA section.

patterns.name: Banner CTA
patterns.description: Full-width banner with contrasting background, urgency-driven copy, and inline CTA. Good for promotions.

structure.content: max-w-6xl mx-auto flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4

patterns.conversion_tip: Use urgency: 'Limited Time', 'This Week Only', 'First Visit'. Keep text to one line.

patterns.name: Map + CTA
patterns.description: Interactive map showing business location alongside contact info and CTA button. Drives foot traffic.

structure.content: max-w-6xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8

patterns.conversion_tip: Link directions button to Google Maps. Show today's hours prominently.
